{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/heads/master/assets/cubyz/items/textures/torch.png
|block_health=0.5
|rotation=torch
|tool=[[Axe]]
}}

Torches are cheap light blocks crafted with either [[coal]] or [[sulfur]].

== Obtaining ==
Torches can be crafted with coal or sulfur and 1 wooden plank, producing 8 torches.

== Usage ==

Torches can be placed on the side and top of blocks. If their supporting block is broken, they will break and drop their item.

Coal torches produce a warm yellowish light, while sulfur torches produce a blue light.

Torches can be used to craft other lighting blocks.

== History ==
* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

[[Category:Light Blocks]]
[[Category:Blocks]]
